intended_use_full: ART-Plan+ is indicated for cancer patients for whom radiotherapy treatment has been prescribed. The device includes SmartPlan which allows automatic generation of radiotherapy treatment plans that users import into their own Treatment Planning System (TPS) for dose calculation, review and approval (available for supported prescriptions for prostate only), and Annotate which allows automatic generation of contours for organs at risk, lymph nodes and tumors based on medical images such as CT and MR images. ART-Plan+ is not intended to be used for patients less than 18 years of age.
target_condition: Cancer patients requiring radiotherapy treatment (primary focus on prostate cancer for treatment planning module)
ground_truth: Manual contours performed by medical experts; inter-expert variability comparisons between two independent medical experts
other_metrics: Dice Similarity Coefficient (DSC) for organs at risk: mean DSC ≥ 0.8 (quantitative evaluation), mean DSC ≥ mean inter-expert DSC with -5% tolerance (inter-expert variability); Brain metastasis: mean lesion-wise sensitivity ≥ 0.86, mean lesion-wise precision ≥ 0.70, mean lesion-wise DSC ≥ 0.78, mean patient-wise DSC ≥ 0.83, mean patient-wise false positives ≤ 2.1; Glioblastoma: mean sensitivity ≥ 0.80, mean DSC ≥ 0.76; Treatment plans: effectiveness difference in DVH goals ≤ 5% (quantitative), ≥ 93% clinically acceptable plans (qualitative); Non-regression testing: mean DSC should not regress negatively beyond -5% relative error; Qualitative evaluation: A+B ≥ 85% (acceptable without or with minor modifications)
